fact_nuggets.text: Wonder Skin (Japanese: Miracle Skin) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.
Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI Unavailable S MD It makes it easier for the Pokemon to dodge status moves!

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Wonder Skin lowers the accuracy of status moves used against the Pokemon with this Ability to 50%. If the move's accuracy is already 50% or less, it does not change. Other effects may still be able to modify the accuracy after Wonder Skin's effect. Wonder Skin does not affect moves without an accuracy check , or moves used by Pokemon with Mold Breaker , Teravolt , or Turboblaze . Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Wonder Skin has no effect outside of battle.

Other effects may still be able to modify the accuracy after Wonder Skin's effect. Wonder Skin does not affect moves without an accuracy check , or moves used by Pokemon with Mold Breaker , Teravolt , or Turboblaze .
Lowers incoming non-damaging moves' base accuracy to exactly 50%.
